name: Moringa Seeds
description: Powerful botanical seeds containing natural cationic polyelectrolyte proteins that act as organic flocculants, clarifying turbid water and precipitating >90% of suspended pathogens.
preparation: Crush dry Moringa seeds into a fine powder. Mix with turbid water at a ratio of 50-150 mg powder per liter. Stir rapidly for 2 minutes, then slowly for 10 minutes. Let settle for 1 hour to precipitate contaminants, then decant or filter.
safetyAlert: Only drink the clarified top layer of decanted water. Boiling the clarified water is still highly recommended to guarantee absolute microbial sterility.
interactions: No documented drug interactions when consumed as treated water. Highly safe organic alternative.

demographicCautions.title: PREGNANCY SAFE SANITIZER
demographicCautions.message: Highly recommended and safe. Providing microbiologically clean drinking water is vital to prevent severe gastrointestinal infections during pregnancy.
